channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: $2 million and counting paid out in Charlie Kirk settlements
item.description: At least $2 million in settlements has been paid after employees and critics were fired or penalized for posts about Charlie Kirk.

item.title: Americans are spending faster than their income is growing
item.description: Data: Bureau of Economic Analysis ; Chart: Axios Visuals Americans are burning through their financial cushion at an accelerating pace, spending faste...

item.title: Scoop: U.S. and Iran reach deal but need Trump's final approval, officials say
item.description: U.S. and Iranian negotiators have reached an agreement on a 60-day memorandum of understanding to extend the ceasefire and launch negotiations on Iran...

item.title: CEOs are losing confidence, new survey finds
item.description: Data: The Conference Board and The Business Council; Note: A number below 50 reflects more negative than positive responses; Chart: Emily Peck/Axios T...
